title: Neural Audio Codecs: How Speech Tokens Power Voice AI

pages.title: Inside A Neural Audio Codec
pages.kicker: A learned bottleneck turns dense waveforms into discrete symbols a sequence model can predict.

cards.title: Encoder
cards.body: Compress waveform frames into a lower-rate continuous representation.

cards.title: Quantizer
cards.body: Replace vectors with entries from learned codebooks.

cards.title: Codebook stack
cards.body: Residual layers add coarse-to-fine acoustic detail.

cards.title: Decoder
cards.body: Reconstruct playable audio from predicted token streams.

pages.title: Token Rate Changes The Product
pages.kicker: Codec efficiency trades against context length, latency, acoustic detail, and robustness.

cards.title: Lower frame rate
cards.body: Fewer autoregressive decisions can reduce latency and cost.

cards.title: More acoustic detail
cards.body: Additional codebooks preserve timbre, prosody, and fine timing.

cards.title: Longer context
cards.body: Compact streams fit more conversation into a fixed model window.

cards.title: Error exposure
cards.body: Dense token streams create more places for loss and drift.

pages.title: The Codec Can Hide Failure
pages.kicker: Pleasant reconstruction can still alter words, identity, timing, or streaming continuity.

cards.title: Phonetic deletion
cards.body: Compression can erase a short sound that changes a critical word.

cards.title: Speaker drift
cards.body: Identity cues can vary across a long generated response.

cards.title: Prosody flattening
cards.body: Pitch, stress, pauses, and emotion may lose contrast.

cards.title: Streaming breaks
cards.body: Lost tokens or decoder resets can create clicks and repetition.
